/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/djpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/cdjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdcolmap-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdcolmap-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/rdswitch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrbmp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrgif-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrgif-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrpng-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrpng-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrpng-16.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrppm-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrppm-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrppm-16.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrtarga.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/adler32.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/compress.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/crc32.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/deflate.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/inffast.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/inflate.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/inftrees.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/trees.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/zlib-static.dir/zlib/zutil.c.o" "src/spng/CMakeFiles/spng-static.dir/spng.c.o" -o djpeg-static  libjpeg.a
